phases.phase-1: Self-host fonts (Inter+Fraunces woff2), create tokens.css, base.css, layout.css, components.css, rewrite global.css as import chain
phases.phase-2: Build 8 UI primitives: Button, Card, Badge, Input, Tag, LinkChip, SectionHeader, Divider in components/ui/
phases.phase-3: Refactor Layout, Header, Footer, MobileNav, ThemeToggle to components/layout/, fix class naming, extract Header component with mobile menu JS
phases.phase-4: Add section styles (hero, block-layout, media-frame, rich-text-prose, stats-row) to pages.css for existing CMS sections
phases.phase-5: Add card styles (card-surface, listing-card, master-card, tag-pill, portfolio-card, testimonial-card, service-badge) to pages.css
phases.phase-6: Add detail page styles (detail-hero, detail-orb, detail-section, detail-timeline, detail-gallery, detail-metric, detail-cta, detail-tags) to pages.css
phases.phase-7: Simplify motion: removed Lenis, parallax, scroll progress, header visibility; kept scroll-reveal (fadeUp), card spotlight, back-to-top; removed lenis dependency

cssArchitecture.tokens.css: CSS custom properties: colors, glass, accents, typography, spacing, shadows, motion
cssArchitecture.base.css: @font-face declarations, CSS reset, typography, dark theme overrides
cssArchitecture.layout.css: Container, grid, section, flex/text utilities, responsive display, scroll-reveal keyframe
cssArchitecture.components.css: 8 UI primitives: Button, Card, Badge, Input, Tag, LinkChip, SectionHeader, Divider
cssArchitecture.pages.css: Header, footer, hero, block-layout, cards, detail pages, stats, forms
cssArchitecture.global.css: Thin import chain: tailwindcss + tokens + base + layout + components + pages

designSystem.themes: Light + dark, user-switchable via data-theme attribute
designSystem.motion: Minimal: fadeUp scroll-reveal, cursor card spotlight, back-to-top

fileStructure.styles/: tokens.css, base.css, layout.css, components.css, pages.css, global.css
fileStructure.components/ui/: Button.astro, Card.astro, Badge.astro, Input.astro, Tag.astro, LinkChip.astro, SectionHeader.astro, Divider.astro
